# â”€â”€ LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (13 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_the_new_order = {
    # basic_heavy_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }

    # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech â€” 1943

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }

arm_grant_land_infantry_the_new_order = {
    # infantry_weapons â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # rangers_tech â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = rangers_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons_1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_kit_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }

    }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1975 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = night_vision_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_at_upgrade_3 â€” 1975
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_at_upgrade_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1975 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_at_upgrade_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_weapons_improvements_grenade_3 â€” 1976

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons_improvements_grenade_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1976 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons_improvements_grenade_3

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1976 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1978 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1978 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_at4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

# â”€â”€ LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (8 techs) â”€â”€

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_the_new_order = {
    # gwtank â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) â”€â”€

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1944 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised_the_new_order = {
    # mechanised_infantry â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (6 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1938 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_the_new_order = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) â”€â”€

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_the_new_order = {
    # main_battle_tank â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MOTORISED (8 techs) â”€â”€

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorized_infantry
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorized_rocket_unit
#   year=1939 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorized_infantry_1
#   year=1950 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorized_infantry_2
#   year=1962 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorized_infantry_3
#   year=1972 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorized_infantry_4
#   year=1982 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised_the_new_order = {
    # tech_trucks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_infantry â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_rocket_unit â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_rocket_unit }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorized_rocket_unit
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_infantry_1 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_infantry_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorized_infantry_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_infantry_2 â€” 1962
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1962 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_infantry_3 â€” 1972
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_infantry_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1972 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorized_infantry_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorized_infantry_4 â€” 1982
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorized_infantry_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1982 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorized_infantry_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_the_new_order = {
    # tech_support â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon_focus_bonus â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon_focus_bonus }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon_focus_bonus
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_infantry_equipment â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_infantry_equipment }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_infantry_equipment
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_train â€” 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech â€” 1938

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_helicopter_artillery_observers_tech }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support

    }
    # tech_engineers â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_military_police
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = combat_support_equipment_4
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon5 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = night_vision_5
            has_tech = infantry_kit_7
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company5 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = combat_support_equipment_4
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital5 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = combat_support_equipment_4
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # trains_1985 â€” 1985
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = trains_1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = trains_1985
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # military_infrastructure5 â€” 1985
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = military_infrastructure5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = military_infrastructure5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # command_and_control5 â€” 1985
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = command_and_control5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = command_and_control5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_attack_helicopter_company4 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_attack_helicopter_company4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_attack_helicopter_company4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_military_police6 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_military_police6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_military_police6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company6 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company6 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers6 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = combat_support_equipment_4
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon6 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_recon6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = night_vision_5
            has_tech = infantry_kit_9
        }
        add_technology = tech_recon6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company6 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = combat_support_equipment_4
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital6 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = combat_support_equipment_4
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=1990 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_the_new_order = {
    # armored_car1 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_spaa â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_td â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_art â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_spaa â€” 1934

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_1 â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_td â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_art â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # JAP_lighter_tanks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = JAP_lighter_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = JAP_lighter_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # GER_heavy_armored_car â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = GER_heavy_armored_car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = GER_heavy_armored_car
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_1 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = NOR_rikstanken_tech }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }

            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_2 â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_2

    # basic_medium_td â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = NSB_AC_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # NSB_APC_1980 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = NSB_APC_1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
