# â”€â”€ NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (24 techs) â”€â”€

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy_1945
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# continue_battleship_development
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[continue_battleship_development]

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_battleship_1960
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_battleship_1970
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy_custom_jellicoe
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# semi_modern_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_battleship_1980
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_battleship_1990
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships_the_new_order = {
    # early_battlecruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_battleship â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy_1945 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy_1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy_1945
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battlecruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_battleship â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = improved_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_battleship â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = advanced_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship2 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # continue_battleship_development â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = continue_battleship_development }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = continue_battleship_development
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_tech = continue_battleship_development
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_battleship_1960 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_battleship_1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_battleship_1960
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_battleship_1970 â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_battleship_1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_battleship_1970
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy_custom_jellicoe â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_heavy_custom_jellicoe }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy_custom_jellicoe
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # semi_modern_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_battleship_1980 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_battleship_1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_battleship_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_battleship_1990 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_battleship_1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_battleship_1990
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / CARRIERS (16 techs) â”€â”€

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_carrier_1960
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_carrier_1970
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# semi_modern_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_carrier_1980
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# modern_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# nuclear_carrier_1990
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers_the_new_order = {
    # early_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_refined_pykrete â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_carrier_1960 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_carrier_1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_carrier_1960
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_carrier_1970 â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_carrier_1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_carrier_1970
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # semi_modern_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_carrier_1980 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_carrier_1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_carrier_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_carrier_1990 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_carrier_1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_carrier_1990
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / DESTROYERS (23 techs) â”€â”€

# early_destroyer
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_destroyer
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_destroyer
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_light
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sonar
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_depth_charges
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_sonar
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# good_sonar
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_sonar
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# semi_modern_ship_hull_light
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# even_more_modern_depth_charges
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# semi_modern_sonar
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_ship_hull_light
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# super_modern_depth_charges
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_sonar
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_the_new_order = {
    # early_destroyer â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_destroyer â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_destroyer â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_destroyer â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_light â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = smoke_generator
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_depth_charges â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_depth_charges
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sonar â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_light â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_depth_charges â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_depth_charges
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_sonar â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_light â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_depth_charges â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_depth_charges
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # good_sonar â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = good_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = good_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_light â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_depth_charges â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = modern_depth_charges
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_sonar â€” 1970

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # semi_modern_ship_hull_light â€” 1980

            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # even_more_modern_depth_charges â€” 1980

            NOT = { has_tech = even_more_modern_depth_charges }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

    # semi_modern_sonar â€” 1980

            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

        add_technology = semi_modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_ship_hull_light â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers

            NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
