            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / HEAVY_CRUISERS (5 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

# early_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_heavy_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_the_new_order = {
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # early_heavy_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / LIGHT_CRUISERS (18 techs) â”€â”€

# early_light_cruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_light_cruiser
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_light_cruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_light_cruiser
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# early_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_corvette_1960
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# nuclear_cruiser_1960
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_corvette_1970
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# nuclear_cruiser_1970
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# semi_modern_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_corvette_1980
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# nuclear_cruiser_1980
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_ship_hull_cruiser
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# missile_corvette_1990
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# nuclear_cruiser_1990
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=light_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_light_cruisers_the_new_order = {
    # early_light_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # missile_corvette_1960 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = missile_corvette_1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = missile_corvette_1960
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_cruiser_1960 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_cruiser_1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_cruiser_1960
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # missile_corvette_1970 â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = missile_corvette_1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = missile_corvette_1970
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_cruiser_1970 â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_cruiser_1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_cruiser_1970
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # semi_modern_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # missile_corvette_1980 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = missile_corvette_1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = missile_corvette_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_cruiser_1980 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_cruiser_1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_cruiser_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # missile_corvette_1990 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = missile_corvette_1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = missile_corvette_1990
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_cruiser_1990 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_cruiser_1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_cruiser_1990
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / NAVAL_SUPPORT (24 techs) â”€â”€

# transport
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# sp_multi_product_supply_ships
#   year=1938 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20 [XP_GATED]

# landing_craft
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# airdrop_mines_bba
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# airsweep_mines_bba
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# sp_improved_support_ship
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20 [XP_GATED]

# sp_improved_repair_ship
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20 [XP_GATED]

# sp_standard_tenshioned_replenishment_alongside_method
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20 [XP_GATED]

# tank_landing_craft
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# basic_naval_mines
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# submarine_mine_laying
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# improved_naval_mines
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# mtg_transport
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# degaussing
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# gunship_1964
#   year=1964 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# mtg_landing_craft
#   year=1965 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# gunship_1966
#   year=1966 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# gunship_1968
#   year=1968 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# advanced_naval_mines
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# airdrop_mines
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# mtg_tank_landing_craft
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# modern_naval_mines
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# airsweep_mines
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

# landing_ship_dock
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=naval_support
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=20

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_the_new_order = {
    # transport â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = transport }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = transport
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_multi_product_supply_ships
    # landing_craft â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # airdrop_mines_bba â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = airdrop_mines_bba }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = airdrop_mines_bba
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # airsweep_mines_bba â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = airsweep_mines_bba }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = airsweep_mines_bba
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_improved_support_ship
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_improved_repair_ship
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): sp_standard_tenshioned_replenishment_alongside_method
    # tank_landing_craft â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_naval_mines â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # submarine_mine_laying â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = submarine_mine_laying
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_naval_mines â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = improved_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mtg_transport â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mtg_transport }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = mtg_transport
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # degaussing â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = degaussing }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = degaussing
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gunship_1964 â€” 1964
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gunship_1964 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1964 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = gunship_1964
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mtg_landing_craft â€” 1965
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mtg_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1965 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = mtg_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gunship_1966 â€” 1966
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gunship_1966 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1966 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = gunship_1966
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gunship_1968 â€” 1968
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gunship_1968 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1968 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = gunship_1968
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_naval_mines â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = advanced_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # airdrop_mines â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = airdrop_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = airdrop_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mtg_tank_landing_craft â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mtg_tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = mtg_tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_naval_mines â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = modern_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # airsweep_mines â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = airsweep_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = airsweep_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # landing_ship_dock â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = landing_ship_dock }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = landing_ship_dock
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / SUBMARINES (19 techs) â”€â”€

# early_submarine
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_submarine_snorkel
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_submarine
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1945 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_submarine_japan
#   year=1950 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nuclear_sub_1960
#   year=1960 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nuclear_sub_1970
#   year=1970 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nuclear_sub_1980
#   year=1980 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_ship_hull_submarine
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# nuclear_sub_1990
#   year=1990 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_submarines_the_new_order = {
    # early_submarine â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_submarine â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_submarine_snorkel â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine_snorkel }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_aip_engine_improved_tech â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_submarine â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = improved_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_submarine_snorkel
    # sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_submarine â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = advanced_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_submarine_japan â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_submarine_japan }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_submarine_japan
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_sub_1960 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_sub_1960
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_sub_1970 â€” 1970
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1970 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_sub_1970
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = semi_modern_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_sub_1980 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_sub_1980
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = modern_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # nuclear_sub_1990 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_sub_1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = nuclear_sub_1990
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}
